title: An introduction to the UK public investment landscape
body: "This document provides an overview of the UK public investment landscape, detailing the roles and offers of key institutions that provide support and finance to businesses, investors, local government bodies and devolved administrations. It explains how these institutions collaborate to unlock projects and investment opportunities across the UK, and how they work across the private and public sector to deliver national priorities.  The document summarises what types of businesses and projects they worth with and provides examples of how institutions can collaborate to support partners at different stages of their development. It also features practical guidance on eligibility criteria, accessing support, and contact details for further enquiries. "
